[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001001111 6
1 0100111101 6
2 1100001111 6
3 1110110000 5
4 0111110100 6
5 1011001111 7
6 1111111111 a
7 1111110111 9

01 10 0001000000 1
12 21 0001001011 4
23 32 0000110011 4
34 43 0000010011 3
45 54 0000011000 2
56 65 0000010000 1
67 76 1001000010 3
70 07 0011000000 2

02 20 0001110000 3
13 31 0000000111 3
24 42 1001011011 6
35 53 0000010100 2
46 64 1001010010 4
57 75 0000000000 a
60 06 0001110000 3
71 17 0001000010 2

03 30 0000110000 2
14 41 0001001011 4
25 52 0000011000 2
36 63 0100110010 4
47 74 1001000010 3
50 05 0000010000 1
61 16 0001000010 2
72 27 1001000010 3

04 40 0001010000 2
15 51 0000001100 2
26 62 1001110010 5
37 73 0000000010 1
